comments.comment: De-risk draft ready for review. Spike tree created at gemini-extension-spike/. Install with: gemini extensions link gemini-extension-spike/
Spike verified end-to-end. Findings documented in .agents/learnings/plan-19-spike-notes.md

deviations.deviation: No tests — throwaway spike per plan. Coverage deviation documented in plan-19.md task 0.

comments.comment: De-risk draft ready for review. pom.xml: devostat.dist.path + skill.frontmatter added to dev/prod profiles. SKILL.md: frontmatter placeholder at top, 11 path occurrences replaced with devostat.dist.path property. Build output identical to pre-change snapshot.

deviations.deviation: No unit tests — skill body is documentation. Same precedent as plan-18 task 1.

comments.comment: De-risk draft ready for review. plugin-resources/pom.xml: 4 occurrences replaced. plugin-dist/pom.xml: 2 occurrences replaced. diff -rq build.before build/ shows zero diff.

deviations.deviation: No unit tests — acceptance test is pre/post diff of build/ directory, which showed zero diff.

task.name: New Gemini manifest + commands source tree

deviations.deviation: No unit tests — additive source files only. Validation deferred to Task 5 when Maven wiring produces build-gemini/ output.

comments.comment: De-risk draft ready for review. hooks.json created. test-gemini-hook.sh reads command from hooks.json, runs it with fake extensionPath, asserts all 9 JS files + node_modules/fast-xml-parser + node hello.js smoke test. All assertions pass.

De-risk draft ready for review. gemini profile added to root pom.xml with maven.multiModuleProjectDirectory. claude profile added to plugin-resources/pom.xml (activeByDefault) isolating Claude-specific executions. Gemini executions in gemini profile. build-gemini/ produces correct layout. Claude build unchanged (leading blank line in dev SKILL.md only — harmless).

deviations.deviation: Claude build SKILL.md has a leading blank line due to the ${skill.frontmatter}\n template pattern needed for Gemini frontmatter separation. Harmless for Claude Code.
